occurrence_sentence: "In our work with the leading quantum computing companies, we are often asked how we intend to connect thousands of qubits as their quantum systems continue to grow. In response, we have created this roadmap which highlights how we are addressing this crucial challenge. We are now initiating further dialogue about our approach and technology with key stakeholders in the market," said Daan Kuitenbrouwer, Co-Founder at Delft Circuits.
Delft Circuits appoints Robby Ferdinandus as member of the Executive Board and Chief Commercial Officer (CCO), effective September 22nd.

occurrence_sentence: Delft Circuits appoints Robby Ferdinandus as member of the Executive Board and Chief Commercial Officer (CCO), effective September 22nd.

"We are at a pivotal moment for the quantum industry, with demand pushing past the limits of incumbent solutions. Bringing Robby on board strengthens our ability to meet this challenge head-on. His leadership and commercial expertise will help Delft Circuits accelerate adoption of Cri/oFlex® and support customers as they scale to thousands of qubits," said Daan Kuitenbrouwer, Co-Founder at Delft Circuits.

Bluefors, the world leader in cryogenic measurement systems, today announced a strategic partnership with Delft Circuits to offer their turnkey quantum input/output (I/O) solutions.

interaction_phrase: Together, Bluefors and Delft Circuits provide an industrialized, modular solution
occurrence_sentence: Together, Bluefors and Delft Circuits provide an industrialized, modular solution that allows customers to scale faster and more efficiently — and ultimately control more qubits than ever before.

occurrence_sentence: The new partnership delivers one-stop-shop convenience by offering Delft Circuits' flexible, high-density Cri/oFlex® solution pre-installed and fully tested in Bluefors cryogenic measurement systems.
